code: import{Card}from'react-bootstrap';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import Rating from'./Rating';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Product=_ref=>{let book=_ref.book;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Card,{className:"my-3 p-3 rounded product-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/product/".concat(book.id),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Card.Img,{src:book.image,variant:"top",style:{height:'250px',objectFit:'cover'}})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Card.Body,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/product/".concat(book.id),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Card.Title,{as:"div",className:"product-title",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:book.name})})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Card.Text,{as:"div",className:"text-muted",children:book.author}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Card.Text,{as:"div",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Rating,{value:book.rating,text:"".concat(book.numReviews," recenzija")})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Card.Text,{as:"h3",className:"text-success",children:book.city})]})]});};export default Product;

sourcesContent: import { Card } from 'react-bootstrap' import { Link } from 'react-router-dom' import Rating from './Rating' const Product = ({ book }) => { return ( {book.name} {book.author} {book.city} ) } export default Product
